architecture_refactor_notes: 2026-05-03: Collection listing execution, tabular report export rendering, approval side-effect helper reuse, and validator static data were moved behind deeper Modules. User-visible authorization policy and capability semantics are unchanged.

2026-05-03: Entity visibility projections, collection listing definitions, export pipeline definitions, approval resolution plans, and KRI value governance were moved behind deeper Modules. User-visible authorization policy and capability semantics are unchanged.

2026-05-03: Additional architecture-only deepening moved entity mutation lifecycle, register listing execution, monitoring response projection, questionnaire lifecycle, KRI history governance, and frontend link presentation behind shared Modules. User-visible authorization policy and capability semantics are unchanged.

2026-05-03: Follow-up architecture-only split moved approval queue projection, shared collection listing contracts, and KRI history response projection into service-owned Modules. User-visible authorization policy and capability semantics are unchanged.

2026-05-04: Corrective architecture-only pass moved KRI value direct application and approval intake behind service-owned Modules, alongside auth session outcomes, collection contracts, register listing planners, issue workflow planning, logging/scheduler runtime, release tooling, and frontend helper ownership. User-visible authorization policy and capability semantics are unchanged.

2026-05-05: Corrective architecture-only follow-up moved SSO exchange route adaptation and issue register listing planning behind production-owned Modules while preserving backend authorization, issue visibility, and capability semantics.

2026-05-05: Corrective architecture-only split moved entity mutation approval/policy/direct/archive planning and control execution access/projection/link policy behind service-owned Modules. User-visible authorization policy and capability semantics are unchanged.

2026-05-05: Nine-area corrective architecture-only pass moved identity/access lifecycle, approval queue intake/projection, vendor governance, report export definitions, activity log query, deadline execution, authz validator internals, global config lifecycle, and users access workflow behind production-owned Modules. User-visible authorization policy and capability semantics are unchanged.

2026-05-06: Architecture-only authorization perimeter pass moved Risk Hub config capability builders and service-level permission checks behind the existing authorization capability Module. User-visible authorization policy and capability semantics are unchanged.

2026-05-09: Architecture-only KRI deadline cleanup moved the reporting grace-window default to the KRI period-algebra SSOT while preserving notification visibility, manual trigger authorization, and capability semantics.

2026-05-09: Architecture cleanup Wave 6a moved orphaned-item access behind direct package functions, added outbox SchedulerJobRun visibility, centralized frontend query-key factories, and added literal-flat capability schema contracts. User-visible authorization policy and capability semantics are unchanged.

2026-05-09: Architecture cleanup Wave 6b split AuthContext into Session, Preferences, and AuthActions providers while preserving the useAuth compatibility surface and route/session authorization semantics.
principles: Backend authorization is authoritative for protected data and mutations.
Frontend gates mirror backend policy and must use backend capability metadata for migrated action affordances.
Frontend-only permission checks are route/session guards or documented gaps, not mutation authority.
Policy-changing diffs must update this contract and the matching test guidance.
Architecture-only refactors of authz-sensitive files must update this contract and JSON mirror, with policy-preservation noted when behavior is intentionally unchanged.
Capability field-shape drift between backend Pydantic schemas and frontend Zod schemas is validated by docs/security/capability-catalog.json.

actions.action: List access users and scoped department users
actions.actor_scope: Platform admin, CRO, global scoped users, and department heads according to access workflow policy
actions.backend_authority: backend/app/api/v1/endpoints/access.py uses the access workflow policy and returns AccessUserRead with backend capabilities
actions.service_policy: backend/app/services/_access_workflow/policy.py
actions.response_capability: backend/app/schemas/access.py AccessUserCapabilities on each AccessUserRead
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/pages/UsersPage.tsx, frontend/src/components/access/UsersTable.tsx, frontend/src/components/access/AccessUserRow.tsx, frontend/src/components/access/usersTablePresentation.ts; frontend/src/components/access/useAccessUsersWorkflow.ts owns safe row action and presentation models while preserving backend capability precedence

actions.action: Update identity, role, business access, active status, and break-glass state
actions.actor_scope: Platform admin owns identity/Admin-role fields; CRO owns business access fields; backend capabilities narrow per target user
actions.service_policy: backend/app/services/_access_workflow/policy.py; backend/app/services/_identity_access_lifecycle/ owns identity/profile/access mutation planning without changing authorization semantics
actions.response_capability: backend/app/schemas/access.py AccessUserCapabilities
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/components/access/AccessEditModal.tsx resolves backend AccessUserCapabilities without permission fallback; frontend/src/components/access/useAccessUsersWorkflow.ts owns shared access-user action facts used by production rows

actions.action: Read backend-authoritative access-user action capabilities on access user rows
actions.actor_scope: Same access-list visibility; backend computes per-target identity, business-access, role, lifecycle, break-glass, and session actions
actions.backend_authority: backend/app/api/v1/endpoints/access.py returns AccessUserRead.capabilities for access user list/update responses
actions.service_policy: backend/app/services/_access_workflow/policy.py::access_user_capabilities
actions.response_capability: backend/app/schemas/access.py AccessUserCapabilities; docs/security/capability-catalog.json access_user surface validates backend and frontend field parity
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/services/api/schemas/entities/identity.ts requires accessUserCapabilitiesSchema on each AccessUserRead; frontend/src/components/access/useAccessUsersWorkflow.ts and frontend/src/components/access/usersTablePresentation.ts consume backend capabilities without optional fallback

actions.action: List paginated user directory mode entries and role facets
actions.actor_scope: Requires users:read; visible user universe is scoped by backend user visibility policy
actions.service_policy: backend/app/core/permissions.py, backend/app/core/permission_cache.py, backend/app/api/v1/endpoints/users/_visibility.py, backend/app/api/v1/endpoints/users/_lifecycle.py; backend/app/api/v1/endpoints/users/summary.py consumes backend/app/services/_authorization_capabilities/::build_me_capabilities for /me/shell-summary can_view_governance
actions.response_capability: backend/app/schemas/user.py UserDirectoryCapabilities plus backend-provided available_roles facets
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/authz/BusinessRouteGuards.tsx, frontend/src/pages/UsersPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/UserNewPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/users/useUsersPageData.ts, and frontend/src/pages/users/useUserNewPageAccess.ts

actions.action: Search directory users, read directory profile details, import directory users, and administer directory deprovision/break-glass lifecycle
actions.actor_scope: Admin-only for directory search/import and admin directory lifecycle; CRO/Risk Manager users with users:read cannot import directory users
actions.service_policy: backend/app/services/_directory_identity/, backend/app/services/ad_deprovision_service.py, backend/app/services/directory_provider_service.py, and backend/app/services/_graph_directory/; backend/app/services/_identity_access_lifecycle/ owns directory import, SSO field-lock, break-glass, access profile mutation, and last-privileged-user decisions behind the public facades
actions.response_capability: backend/app/schemas/access.py AccessUserCapabilities.can_break_glass_enable for access review surfaces; directory import responses expose lifecycle result fields, not action capability objects
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/pages/UserNewPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/users/UserNewDirectoryImportSection.tsx, frontend/src/components/access/AccessEditModal.tsx, and frontend/src/components/access/

actions.action: Read risk lists, detail, lookups, linked controls, and linked vendors
actions.actor_scope: Requires risks:read plus department, owner, or linked-entity visibility helpers; explicit department_id list filters are strict and do not leak ownership/linked-entity exceptions from other departments
actions.service_policy: backend/app/core/_permissions/scoping.py, backend/app/core/_permissions/visible_ids.py, backend/app/core/_permissions/entity_scope_clauses.py, and backend/app/services/authorization_capabilities.py, backend/app/services/_authorization_capabilities/; risk scalar and vendor grouped summaries/drilldowns use SQL-backed counts, bounded page serialization, visible vendor-link contexts, and fail-closed invalid drilldown filters; backend/app/services/_register_listings/ owns shared register listing plans while preserving risk scoping, strict explicit department filtering, and capability projection; backend/app/services/_collection_contracts.py owns the service-local collection listing contract used by register capability pages

actions.action: Create and update risks, including approval-required sensitive changes
actions.actor_scope: Requires risks:write; sensitive updates queue approval when the actor cannot resolve immediately, and privileged approval is required when the parent risk is priority or its net score meets the configured high-risk threshold
actions.service_policy: backend/app/core/_permissions/sensitive.py, backend/app/core/approval_helpers.py, backend/app/services/_approval_execution/, and backend/app/services/authorization_capabilities.py, backend/app/services/_authorization_capabilities/; backend/app/services/_entity_mutation_lifecycle/lifecycle.py remains the route-facing Interface while backend/app/services/_entity_mutation_lifecycle/approval_plans.py, backend/app/services/_entity_mutation_lifecycle/policy.py, backend/app/services/_entity_mutation_lifecycle/direct_apply.py, backend/app/services/_entity_mutation_lifecycle/archive_plans.py, and backend/app/services/_entity_mutation_lifecycle/projection.py own approval-vs-direct mutation planning without changing policy
actions.response_capability: backend/app/schemas/risk.py RiskCapabilities.can_update, can_update_sensitive_fields, can_request_update_approval, can_create_kri, can_create_linked_control, can_link_controls, can_unlink_controls, and can_create_issue
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/pages/RisksPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/RiskNewPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/RiskEditPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/RiskDetailPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/risks/, frontend/src/components/risks/RiskDetailOverviewTab.tsx, and frontend/src/components/risks/detail-overview/ use backend capabilities; direct create/edit routes load collection/detail capability metadata before rendering forms

actions.actor_scope: Requires risks:write or risks:delete depending on action; create requires at least one non-archived parent risk in department scope; department/vendor visibility checked on linked entities; KRI edits require privileged approval when the parent risk is priority or meets the configured high-risk threshold
actions.service_policy: backend/app/core/_permissions/scoping.py, backend/app/core/approval_helpers.py, backend/app/api/v1/endpoints/kris/access.py, backend/app/api/v1/endpoints/approvals/_delete_authorization.py, and backend/app/services/authorization_capabilities.py, backend/app/services/_authorization_capabilities/, backend/app/services/_kri_history/intake.py, backend/app/services/_kri_history/loading.py, backend/app/services/_kri_history/approval_intake.py, and backend/app/services/_kri_history/direct_application.py for value intake orchestration; backend/app/services/_entity_mutation_lifecycle/lifecycle.py remains the route-facing Interface while backend/app/services/_entity_mutation_lifecycle/approval_plans.py, backend/app/services/_entity_mutation_lifecycle/policy.py, backend/app/services/_entity_mutation_lifecycle/direct_apply.py, backend/app/services/_entity_mutation_lifecycle/archive_plans.py, and backend/app/services/_entity_mutation_lifecycle/projection.py own approval-vs-direct mutation planning without changing policy

actions.action: Submit values, read history, and request corrections
actions.actor_scope: Submit uses ensure_can_submit_value; KRI value submissions require privileged approval when the parent risk is priority or meets the configured high-risk threshold; correction requires risks:write and readable KRI unless privileged approver executes immediately
actions.service_policy: backend/app/services/_kri_history/workflow.py, backend/app/services/_kri_history/recording.py, backend/app/services/_kri_history/queries.py, backend/app/services/_kri_history/loading.py, backend/app/services/_kri_history/approval_intake.py, backend/app/services/_kri_history/direct_application.py, backend/app/services/_kri_history/projection.py, backend/app/services/_approval_execution/kri_value_submission.py, backend/app/core/approval_helpers.py, backend/app/services/authorization_capabilities.py, backend/app/services/_authorization_capabilities/; backend/app/services/_kri_history/governance.py centralizes value and correction governance without changing capabilities
actions.response_capability: backend/app/schemas/kri.py KRICapabilities and KRIHistoryCapabilities.can_request_correction
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/pages/KRIDetailPage.tsx, frontend/src/components/kris/, and frontend/src/pages/detail/useKriDetailState.ts use backend capabilities

actions.action: Request, list, read, approve, reject, cancel, and inspect approval side effects
actions.actor_scope: Requesting uses resource-specific delete/update helpers; risk and KRI update/value requests derive primary approver and privileged-approval requirements from shared approval metadata helpers; generic POST /approvals delete requests also load the matching delete scenario snapshot, KRI primary approver routing, and reject disabled scenarios instead of creating legacy approvals; scenario-backed approvals use approval scenario snapshots for requires-approval and approver-role policy; legacy approvals without snapshots preserve can_resolve_approvals fallback
actions.service_policy: backend/app/core/approval_helpers.py, backend/app/services/approval_execution_service.py owns approve, reject, and cancel workflow boundaries, with backend/app/services/approval_scenario_policy.py and `resolve_approval_privilege_tier`, backend/app/services/_approval_execution/, backend/app/services/_approval_queue/ for queue intake/projection, and backend/app/services/authorization_capabilities.py, backend/app/services/_authorization_capabilities/; backend/app/services/_approval_queue/contracts.py, delete_intake.py, projection.py, counts.py, queries.py, and execution.py own queue intake/projection while preserving approval authorization behavior
actions.response_capability: backend/app/schemas/approval_request.py and backend/app/schemas/__init__.py ApprovalRequestCapabilities plus preserved can_approve and can_reject booleans; approval scenario snapshot fields remain internal
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/routing/business.tsx exposes approvals navigation to non-platform-admin business users; frontend/src/pages/approvals/ uses ApprovalRequestCapabilities for approve, reject, and cancel actions

actions.action: List, count, mark, and configure current-user notifications plus manual KRI deadline check trigger
actions.actor_scope: Notification reads and counts are current-user scoped and linked-resource filtered; mark-read mutations are current-user ownership scoped; manual KRI deadline trigger requires approval-resolution authority
actions.service_policy: backend/app/services/notification_visibility.py applies risk, control, KRI, vendor, approval, and questionnaire visibility helpers; issue-linked notifications require issues:read plus issue visibility scope; creation-time notification recipient loaders use user_selectinload_options(include_permissions=True) before can_read_* checks so manager-derived department scope is available; backend/app/services/kri_deadline_service.py and backend/app/services/questionnaire_deadline_service.py use creation-time visibility gates where available; approval_privilege_tier preserves can_resolve_approvals authority for the manual KRI deadline trigger; backend/app/services/_deadline_execution/ owns shared deadline notification execution, dedupe, visibility gates, and result aggregation while issue/KRI domain policies remain local
actions.response_capability: None; notification payloads are scoped server-side
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/components/notifications/ and frontend/src/services/notificationsApi.ts

actions.action: Read vendor lists, details, grouped views, linked risks, controls, and KRIs
actions.actor_scope: Requires vendors:read and vendor ownership/department visibility; linked entities require their own read policy
actions.service_policy: backend/app/services/_vendor_workflow/policy.py, backend/app/services/_register_listings/vendors.py, backend/app/services/_vendor_governance/links.py, and backend/app/core/_permissions/visible_ids.py for set-based linked-risk redaction; vendor grouped summaries/drilldowns use SQL-backed counts, bounded page serialization, and visible risk-link contexts; backend/app/services/_vendor_links/ owns shared read/list workflow; backend/app/services/_vendor_governance/projection.py, backend/app/services/_vendor_governance/lifecycle.py, and backend/app/services/_vendor_governance/policy.py own vendor read projection and capabilities behind HTTP adapters
actions.response_capability: backend/app/schemas/vendor.py VendorCapabilities on VendorRead and VendorListResponse collection capabilities
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/routing/business.tsx uses a vendors:read navigation projection; frontend/src/pages/vendors/ and frontend/src/types/vendor.ts, frontend/src/pages/VendorsPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/VendorDetailPage.tsx, and frontend/src/pages/shared/collectionPageState.ts use backend read authority and render denied/clear stale rows and capabilities on backend 403

actions.action: Create, update, archive, restore, and mutate vendor links
actions.actor_scope: Requires vendors:write/delete or vendor-owner exception; edit and link mutations require an active visible vendor and visible target entity; inactive vendors can only be restored when authorized
actions.service_policy: backend/app/services/_vendor_workflow/policy.py and backend/app/services/_vendor_links/ own shared link/unlink workflow; backend/app/services/_vendor_governance/links.py owns vendor link authorization and mutation helpers; backend/app/services/_vendor_governance/lifecycle.py and policy.py own create/update/archive/restore authorization outcomes while preserving vendor owner exceptions and inactive-vendor rejection
actions.response_capability: backend/app/schemas/vendor.py VendorCapabilities.can_update, can_archive, can_restore, can_link_risk, can_link_control, can_link_kri, can_create_linked_risk, can_create_linked_control, can_create_linked_kri, and can_create_issue
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/pages/vendors/, frontend/src/pages/VendorsPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/VendorDetailPage.tsx, and vendor detail tabs use backend capabilities; direct create/edit routes load collection/detail capability metadata before rendering forms

actions.action: Export risks, controls, KRIs, vendors, issues, audit trail, summary, and vendor reports
actions.actor_scope: Requires reports:read plus actor-visible unfiltered rows and strict explicit department and as-of visibility filters; vendor annual/DORA reports require vendor-report role policy and active actor-visible vendors
actions.service_policy: backend/app/core/_permissions/entity_scope_clauses.py, backend/app/core/_permissions/visible_ids.py, backend/app/api/v1/endpoints/reports/unified_exports/, backend/app/services/vendor_report_policy.py, backend/app/services/_vendor_workflow/policy.py, and report helpers including issue provenance export fields; audit-trail linked-risk redaction uses set-based risk visibility; backend/app/services/_reporting/exports/ owns unified export definitions, criteria, fetch, filters, rows, and execution while endpoint modules remain compatibility adapters
actions.response_capability: RiskListResponse, ControlListResponse, KRIListResponse, VendorListResponse, and backend/app/schemas/issue.py IssueListResponse collection capabilities expose can_export; backend/app/schemas/execution.py ControlExecutionListResponse exposes capabilities.can_export_csv; GET /api/v1/vendor-reports/capabilities exposes vendor-report download and department-filter booleans; exported rows are filtered server-side
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/pages/RisksPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/ControlsPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/KRIsPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/VendorsPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/IssuesPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/AuditTrailPage.tsx, frontend/src/services/reportApi.ts, frontend/src/services/vendorReportApi.ts, export dialogs, and frontend/src/pages/VendorReportsPage.tsx use backend capability metadata for export visibility

actions.action: Read overview, risk, control, KRI, issue, committee, and quarterly dashboard metrics
actions.actor_scope: Requires risks:read, issues:read, vendors:read, or committee access depending on endpoint; unfiltered aggregates use actor-visible backend query helpers, including vendor ownership visibility for vendor metrics

actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/authz/policy.ts for route/session projection, frontend/src/services/dashboardApi.ts, frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/dashboard/DashboardHeader.tsx, and frontend/src/pages/dashboard/useDashboardOverviewState.ts use backend DashboardOverviewCapabilities without local issue-permission query-key discriminators

actions.action: Manage roles, permissions, departments, risk types, questionnaire templates, and approval scenarios
actions.actor_scope: CRO-only business configuration; platform admin is not a business-data authority; inactive records expose false update capabilities and reject edits until restored
actions.service_policy: backend/app/services/_riskhub_config/ and backend/app/services/approval_scenario_policy.py; backend/app/services/_riskhub_config/global_config.py owns global config listing/update validation, audit facts, and commit/reload order behind HTTP adapters
actions.response_capability: backend/app/schemas/riskhub.py RiskHubCapabilitiesRead, RoleHubCapabilities, DepartmentHubCapabilities, RiskTypeCapabilities, and ApprovalScenarioCapabilities where action metadata is exposed
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/components/riskhub/, frontend/src/components/riskhub/useRiskHubCapabilities.ts, frontend/src/services/riskHubApi.ts, and frontend/src/pages/RiskHubPage.tsx

actions.action: Read department list, detail, related risks, controls, and KRIs
actions.actor_scope: Requires departments:read plus scoped related-resource permissions where related lists cross domains
actions.service_policy: backend/app/core/_permissions/scoping.py
actions.response_capability: backend/app/schemas/riskhub.py DepartmentHubCapabilities for Risk Hub department configuration; department detail does not expose action capabilities
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/routing/business.tsx uses a departments:read navigation projection; frontend/src/pages/DepartmentsPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/DepartmentDetailPage.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useDepartmentDetail.ts, and frontend/src/pages/departments/ render denied/clear stale list data on backend 403

actions.action: Send, open, draft, submit, compare, request clarification, and respond
actions.actor_scope: Canonical risk visibility for reads, narrower questionnaire action policy for inbox/open/draft/submit/respond, and RM/CRO send/clarification policy
actions.service_policy: backend/app/services/_risk_questionnaires/policy.py and backend/app/services/_risk_questionnaires/repository.py; backend/app/services/_risk_questionnaires/lifecycle.py centralizes questionnaire lifecycle outcomes without changing policy
actions.response_capability: backend/app/schemas/risk_questionnaire.py RiskQuestionnaireCapabilities and backend/app/schemas/risk.py RiskCapabilities.can_send_questionnaire
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/components/risks/risk-questionnaire-detail/, frontend/src/components/risks/RiskDetailQuestionnairesTab.tsx, frontend/src/components/risks/risk-questionnaire-detail/questionnaireWorkflowState.ts centralizes open-flow UI decisions from backend capabilities/state

actions.action: Create, read, update, link, assign, progress, close, approve exceptions, and view issue activity history
actions.actor_scope: Requires issues:read/write/approve plus issue scope, owner assignment, linked-entity visibility helpers, read-only KRI reporting-owner scope for directly KRI-linked issues, activity history requires activity_log:read and business-view eligibility, active vendor checks for vendor context/link mutations, validated link-backed issue source provenance, protected current source links, set-based linked-resource redaction, duplicate active-exception request denial, and derived context filters
actions.service_policy: backend/app/core/_permissions/issues.py, backend/app/api/v1/endpoints/issues/_shared/source.py, backend/app/services/_issue_workflow/assignment.py, backend/app/api/v1/endpoints/issues/_shared/serialization.py, backend/app/core/_permissions/visible_ids.py, backend/app/services/authorization_capabilities.py, backend/app/services/_authorization_capabilities/; backend/app/api/v1/endpoints/issues/crud/list.py remains the HTTP Adapter for issue list criteria; issue list/detail linked risk/control/KRI/vendor labels, risk/vendor contexts, and grouped context labels/counts are redacted through precomputed visible ID/context sets with fail-closed invalid drilldown filters, backend/app/services/_issue_register/ owns list grouping/context query helpers, and backend/app/services/_register_listings/issues.py owns issue register listing planning used by HTTP adapters
actions.response_capability: backend/app/schemas/issue.py IssueCapabilities including can_view_activity_history, source_display, source_link, and IssueLink.is_source_link metadata on IssueSummary, IssueRead, and IssueListResponse collection capabilities
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/pages/issues/, frontend/src/components/issues/, frontend/src/pages/IssuesPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/IssueDetailPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/IssueNewPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/shared/collectionPageState.ts, frontend/src/pages/detail/ContextualIssueAction.tsx, and frontend/src/components/executions/ use backend capabilities and render denied/clear stale rows and capabilities on backend 403

actions.action: Scan, read, quick-view, stats, and resolve orphaned ownership/dependency items
actions.actor_scope: Governance operator access requires non-platform-admin global/privileged business scope with users:write; backend emits per-orphan resolution requirements
actions.service_policy: backend/app/services/_orphaned_items/workflow.py and backend/app/core/permission_cache.py, backend/app/services/_orphaned_items/resolution_plan.py for shared dry-run/apply requirements
actions.response_capability: backend/app/schemas/orphaned_item.py Orphan capabilities: can_resolve, can_view_detail, requires_owner, requires_risk, requires_department
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/authz/policy.ts mirrors governance route eligibility; frontend/src/components/governance/ and frontend/src/pages/GovernancePage.tsx use backend payloads for orphan actions

actions.action: Read activity log, entity types, and actions
actions.actor_scope: Requires activity_log:read and blocks platform admins from business activity views
actions.service_policy: backend/app/core/security.py require_business_permission; backend/app/services/_activity_log_query/policy.py, backend/app/services/_activity_log_query/query.py, backend/app/services/_activity_log_query/criteria.py, and backend/app/services/_activity_log_query/projection.py own business-view eligibility, department scope, query construction, and ActivityLogCapabilities projection
actions.response_capability: backend/app/schemas/activity_log.py ActivityLogCapabilities on ActivityLogListResponse; response rows remain scoped server-side
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/authz/BusinessRouteGuards.tsx, frontend/src/pages/ActivityLogPage.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActivityLogPageState.ts, and frontend/src/components/activity-log/ActivityLogFilterBar.tsx; frontend/src/hooks/activityLogPageWorkflow.ts owns production-used activity-log filter/view transitions while API calls and rendering remain local

actions.action: Authenticate, refresh, bootstrap session, read auth config, read platform admin capabilities/logs, and revoke sessions
actions.actor_scope: Session authority is backend JWT/refresh/session version; cookie-issuing password login requires an allowed Origin/Referer; refresh replay of a rotated token revokes the rotated child refresh-token chain; admin session revocation and structured log reads are platform-admin-only
actions.service_policy: backend/app/core/security.py, backend/app/api/v1/endpoints/auth/_request_protection.py, backend/app/api/v1/endpoints/auth/sso.py as the SSO HTTP Adapter, backend/app/services/_auth_session/ owns transport-neutral SSO/refresh outcomes, and backend/app/services/sso_token_service.py
actions.response_capability: GET /api/v1/admin/capabilities exposes admin-console action metadata; session/user permissions are returned through auth/bootstrap responses, not per-business-action capabilities
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx, frontend/src/contexts/SessionContext.tsx, frontend/src/contexts/PreferencesContext.tsx, frontend/src/contexts/AuthActionsContext.tsx, and frontend/src/services/session/, frontend/src/authz/useAuthz.ts, frontend/src/authz/policy.ts, frontend/src/lib/capabilities.ts, frontend/src/routing/, frontend/src/components/layout/Sidebar.tsx, frontend/src/pages/AdminConsolePage.tsx, and frontend/src/pages/admin-console/sections/ use route/session projection plus backend admin capabilities for admin action buttons; business route navigation read projections mirror backend read guards and are route-context validated by scripts/security/validate_authz_capability_contract.py

actions.action: Read admin-console action capabilities and render session, directory, log-config, and loaded-audit-log client actions
actions.actor_scope: Platform-admin-only route; non-admin users receive 403 from the capability endpoint and existing admin action endpoints
actions.service_policy: backend/app/api/v1/endpoints/admin/_deps.py require_platform_admin, backend/app/services/_authorization_capabilities/admin.py build_admin_capabilities, backend/app/services/_admin_telemetry/ projection helpers for ops telemetry payloads
actions.response_capability: backend/app/schemas/admin.py AdminConsoleCapabilities with can_revoke_sessions, can_run_directory_check_all, can_update_log_config, and can_export_loaded_audit_logs
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/pages/admin-console/sections/ops/SessionsPanel.tsx, frontend/src/pages/admin-console/sections/ops/SessionsTable.tsx, frontend/src/pages/admin-console/sections/audit/AuditLogsPanel.tsx, and frontend/src/pages/admin-console/sections/audit/LogSettingsPanel.tsx hide action controls when admin capabilities are missing or false
